name: Microsoft Bookings
description: Drive Microsoft Bookings (Microsoft 365 scheduling product) via the Graph API: businesses, services, staff, appointments, customers. 8 tools, OAuth2 Bearer auth.
instructions:
This connector uses the Microsoft Graph API v1.0 — Bookings endpoints (learn.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/api/resources/booking-api-overview).

**Setup**:
1. Register an Azure AD app at https://portal.azure.com → **App registrations → New registration**.
2. **API permissions → Microsoft Graph → Delegated** (or Application) → add: `Bookings.Read.All`, `BookingsAppointment.ReadWrite.All` (write needs admin consent).
3. Run OAuth2 authorization-code (or client-credentials) flow against `login.microsoftonline.com/{tenant}/oauth2/v2.0/token` to get an access token.
4. Set `MICROSOFT_GRAPH_ACCESS_TOKEN`.

**Authentication**: `Authorization: Bearer ${MICROSOFT_GRAPH_ACCESS_TOKEN}`.

**Booking Business ID**: every Microsoft Bookings 'page' is a Booking Business. Discover them via `bookings_list_businesses`. The id looks like `Contoso@yourtenant.onmicrosoft.com` (an SMTP-like address, NOT a UUID).

**Public booking endpoints**: most of Microsoft Bookings is private (admin-only). The public 'self-service' booking pages are at `https://outlook.office.com/owa/calendar/{biz_id}@{tenant}/bookings/` — out of scope; agents use the admin endpoints here.

**Rate limits**: Graph throttling kicks in around 10k req per 10 min per app per user. On 429 honor Retry-After.

**Out of scope here**: webhooks, custom questions per service, Microsoft Bookings staff scheduling rules.

tools.name: microsoft_bookings_list_businesses
tools.description: List all Bookings Businesses (mailbox-style booking pages) on the tenant.

tools.name: microsoft_bookings_get_business
tools.description: Get a Booking Business by ID with its public profile.

tools.name: microsoft_bookings_list_services
tools.description: List services (offerings) of a Booking Business. Each service has id, displayName, duration, defaultPrice, staffMemberIds[], smsNotificationsEnabled.

tools.name: microsoft_bookings_list_staff_members
tools.description: List staff members of a Booking Business.

tools.name: microsoft_bookings_list_appointments
tools.description: List appointments (bookings) in a Booking Business.

tools.name: microsoft_bookings_create_appointment
tools.description: Create a booked appointment. Required: serviceId + start + end + customers.

appointment.description: {serviceId, start:{dateTime:'2025-01-01T15:00:00', timeZone:'Pacific Standard Time'}, end:{...}, customers:[{customerId? OR name+emailAddress}], staffMemberIds?:[], serviceLocation?:{...}, customerNotes?, smsNotificationsEnabled?:bool, isLocationOnline?:bool}.
